      - name: Create and push tag if missing
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          TAG="${{ steps.expected.outputs.expected_tag }}"

          if git ls-remote --tags origin "refs/tags/$TAG" | grep -q "refs/tags/$TAG"; then
            echo "Tag $TAG ya existe en remoto. No hago nada."
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "Creando tag $TAG y subiéndolo..."
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git tag "$TAG"
          git push origin "$TAG"



      # - name: Trivy scan (JSON)
      #   id: trivy_json
      #   uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0
      #   with:
      #     image-ref: ms-factura:${{ steps.ver.outputs.version }}
      #     format: json
      #     output: trivy.json
      #     exit-code: "0"
      #     ignore-unfixed: true
      #     vuln-type: "os,library"
      #     scanners: vuln
      #     trivy-config: .trivy.yaml
